headline: NetApp Wins 2026 Google Cloud Infrastructure Modernization Partner of the Year for Storage
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., April 21, 2026--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, today announced that it has received the 2026 Google Cloud Infrastructure Modernization Partner of the Year for Storage Award.
